title: Vigilante murder accused to appear in court today
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Four suspects are scheduled to...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Four suspects are scheduled to appear in the Knysna Magistrate’s Court today, 4 August, following their arrest in connection with a fatal vigilante attack that occurred in Nekkies on Friday.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Four suspects are scheduled to appear in the Knysna Magistrate’s Court today, 4 August, following their arrest in connection with a fatal vigilante attack that occurred in Nekkies on Friday."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The incident took place at about 10:50, when Knysna Police responded to reports of an assault."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Upon arrival, officers discovered the body of a 28-year-old man with multiple injuries. He was declared dead on the scene by paramedics.","html":"Upon arrival, officers discovered the body of a 28-year-old man with multiple injuries. He was declared dead on the scene by paramedics."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A subsequent investigation led to the arrest of three men and one woman, aged between 25 and 39, who were positively linked to the murder.","html":"A subsequent investigation led to the arrest of three men and one woman, aged between 25 and 39, who were positively linked to the murder."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is a developing story. See this week's Knysna-Plett Herald and keep an eye on our website for updates.","html":"This is a developing story. See this week's Knysna-Plett Herald and keep an eye on our website for updates."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Vigilante murder accused to appear in court today
